title: 菊花賞の後に・激流に逆らいて

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Although Mejiro Ardan wins the Kikuka Sho, she
finds herself feeling more giddy from the lingering
sensation of Super Creek's overwhelming aura.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
She realizes that she has many rivals who will push
her to run with every ounce of her being, and that
as long as they exist, her potential for growth will
remain limitless.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
This epiphany leaves her unable to contain her
excitement for our next goal.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Around this time, Sakura Chiyono O watches the
Kikuka Sho on TV and sees Mejiro Ardan's growth
as a racer with her own eyes.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Mejiro Ardan begins her preparation for the
Osaka Hai. She remains entirely oblivious,
however, to the shadow now cast over Sakura
Chiyono O's face...
